title: zanthoxylum nitidum
intro: Zanthoxylum nitidum, also known as the yellow pepper tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum nitidum include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems are also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
